cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. The question is asking for the date one week from the last day of 1899, which would be December 31, 1899. So if we add one week (7 days) to that date, we need to see what date that would be. First, I need to check if 1899 is a leap year or not. Leap years are divisible by 4. 1899 divided by 4 is 474.75, so it's not a leap year. That means February had 28 days. But since we're dealing with December, which always has 31 days, it doesn't matter here. Adding
